messages.content: I like apples. Apples are red. Red apples are sweet. I like sweet apples. Apples grow on trees. Trees produce apples.

Apples are indeed a popular fruit. Apples are nutritious. Apples contain vitamin C. Apples are crunchy. I agree that apples are delicious. Apples can be stored for months. Different apple varieties taste different. Red apples, green apples, and yellow apples exist. Apples are a good snack. People eat apples for health.
